article_meta.title: Police turned him over to ICE

reasoning: Mixed quality: one solid catch of emotional sensationalism and a defensible slant/framing flag, but a clear attribution violation by flagging a source’s statement as author bias and an overreach on omission-of-attribution. Also missed notable emotive/loaded language in the headline and lede.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged a passage that in the article is explicitly attributed to Lena Graber, violating the rule against using source statements as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two of four items are not solid: one is an attributed source claim mis-flagged, and one is a weak claim of missing source attribution for a surveillance video reference.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear sensational/loaded author prose in the headline/deck (e.g., 'hail of bullets') and lede ('body ripped apart').
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the correctly identified items, labels are defensible (Sensationalism/Emotionalism; Slant). The misattributed item’s label is moot due to the attribution error; the 'Omission of Source Attribution' label is inappropriate for the cited surveillance video reference.
